sharedEntities.description: Core loan data representing loan contracts with status, type, and sale information. Flows from ingestion repo to dags for processing and to datatools for analytics.
Agreements between CRB and partner institutions with terms and parameters, ingested and transformed for analytics.
Fee structures and collection records used in processing workflows and analytics.
Interest accrual records and rate information used in calculations and reporting.
Loan servicing data including adjusted loan amounts and interest paid, ingested and then processed by DAGs.
SOFR rates ingested from Federal Reserve API and used in interest calculations.

dataFlows.name: Loan Data Processing
dataFlows.description: End-to-end flow from ingestion of loan data to processing and analytics
steps: Ingest loan data from external sources
Load into data warehouse for analytics

dataFlows.name: SOFR Rate Processing
dataFlows.description: Ingestion and application of SOFR rates for interest calculations
steps: Fetch SOFR rates from Federal Reserve API
Apply rates in interest accrual calculations

dataFlows.name: Servicing Data Processing
dataFlows.description: Processing of loan servicing information for accounting and reporting
steps: Ingest servicing data from files in S3

integrationPoints.description: Raw loan, contract, and servicing data is ingested and stored in databases accessed by DAGs for processing.
Processed loan data and calculated values from DAGs are accessed by datatools for analytics and reporting.
Raw servicing data files are ingested and stored in S3 for further processing.
Processed data and reports are stored in S3 for downstream consumption.

patterns.description: Extract-Transform-Load pattern used across all repos for data processing
Using Airflow DAGs to schedule and coordinate data processing tasks
Using dbt for SQL-based transformations of raw data into analytics-ready formats
Processing data based on ingestion completion events

ambiguities: The specific business rules governing loan seasoning calculations in cos-lending-selling-dags
The interaction between MPL (Marketplace Lender) entity in cos-lending-selling-dags and MplBootstrapping in cos-lending-selling-ingestion
The specific metrics reported to CloudWatch from cos-lending-selling-ingestion and how they're used for monitoring
